heading: Continuances
label: 949e Continuances
text: The military judge in a military commission under this chapter may, for reasonable cause, grant a continuance to any party for such time, and as often, as may appear to be just.
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 949e, added , , , related to continuances, prior to the general amendment of this chapter by .Pub. L. 109–366, § 3(a)(1)120 Stat. 2613Pub. L. 111–84Oct. 17, 2006
